THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESCOBEDO, GLENDY GOMEZ, JOSE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, RAUL ALMILCAR $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,258.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE PROVISIONS OF CALIF. CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(F) AND (G). PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(L), $600 OF THIS AWARD IS FOR DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH RETENTION OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. RECOVER FROM APPELLANT VASQUEZ, RAUL ALMILCAR $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, $600.00 CCP 1950.5(L), TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,258.00 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-28-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT VASQUEZ, RAUL ALMILCAR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ESCOBEDO, GLENDY GOMEZ, JOSE A. DEFENDANT FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT THE DAMAGE TO THE PROPERTY DID NOT EXIST AT THE TIME OF PLAINTIFF'S MOVE IN OR THAT THEIR TENANACY WAS ANYTHING OTHER THAN MONTH-TO-MONTH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:40am
Judge Pro Tem Steven Kipperman, clerk-S. Ravinantapricha, nothing on record, department 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals.
Appellant, Raul Almilcar Vasquez present in pro per.
Respondents, Glendy Escobedo and Jose A. Gomez present in Pro Per with Spanish Interpreter Virginia Jimemnez.
Parties and Interpreter were sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem.
Plaintiff/Respondent Exhibit 1- Six photograph ---------------------------ID/EVID

Appellant/Defendant Exhibit A- Collective exhibit of photos---------------ID/EVID
Appellant/Defendant Exhibit B- Proposal-----------------------------------ID/EVID

Appellant/Defendant Exhibit C- Letter dtd 09-24-09-------------------------ID/EVID
Appellant/Defendant Exhibit D- Three letters dtd 09-30-09, 10-20-09 and 10-24-09---ID/EVID
9:55am
Matter is submitted, and taken under submission.
Exhibits are retained by the Court.
